red_test.reason: The node records Promoter input and activation semantics without mutating the Promoter checkout.

targeted_test.output: Promoter CLI gate, evidence, mission-rollup, safety, and dry-run boundary tests passed.

integration_test.output: Promoter vet and build passed; generated tmp/bin/promoter-node36 was removed.

status_test.command: inspect Promoter gate and evidence-reference validation source
status_test.output: Structured packet fields and referenced SHA-256 digests are validated; digest mismatch is denied.

next_test.command: inspect signature, signer, key, revocation, and activation paths
next_test.output: Documentation requires signed Covenant policy when applicable, but no cryptographic signature verification or signer/key binding path was found in the inspected CLI source; activation remains dry-run only.

objective: Audit AO Promoter signed assurance-result input boundaries and preserve its digest-checked, dry-run, no-activation semantics through a bounded Atlas compatibility evidence node with no promotion.
